user_prompt: Reference images are Brazil and Japan World Cup team medals/emblems. Following the same style and format, generate another World Cup team emblem for New Zealand: a soccer ball combined with New Zealand flag shield. The shield is purely the NEW ZEALAND flag: dark navy blue with a Union Jack in the top-left and four red stars with white borders (Southern Cross) on the right — must be the New Zealand flag exactly, NOT a silver fern, NOT a plain flag. Centered, ~80% of frame, white background.
